introSection: Water Jumper was a water roller coaster located at Hawally Park in Hawally, Hawalli, Kuwait.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The Water Jumping was originally manufactured as a prototype model at Fabbri's factory in 1999, it appeared at Hawally Park in 2004, presumeably opening with the park.

The ride was removed from the park between 2022 and 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After ascending the lift hill, riders slowly traverse a turn before going down a drop into an upward-angled piece of track, the track then ends, causing the cars to become airborne for a short amount of time before landing in a splash pool, where waterjets push it into another chain lift hill, after traversing another turn, it repeats the first half, but with a larger drop.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Many of the cars were not used during the ride's operation.

fullText:
Water Jumper was a water roller coaster located at Hawally Park in Hawally, Hawalli, Kuwait.

The Water Jumping was originally manufactured as a prototype model at Fabbri's factory in 1999, it appeared at Hawally Park in 2004, presumeably opening with the park.

The ride was removed from the park between 2022 and 2023.

After ascending the lift hill, riders slowly traverse a turn before going down a drop into an upward-angled piece of track, the track then ends, causing the cars to become airborne for a short amount of time before landing in a splash pool, where waterjets push it into another chain lift hill, after traversing another turn, it repeats the first half, but with a larger drop.

Many of the cars were not used during the ride's operation.
